THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, ERMA DISMISSAL FILED 7 JUNE 1999 IS ORDERED VACATED. STIPULATED JUDGMENT DEFENDANT WILL ALLOW ANOTHER INDIVIDUAL TO RESIDE IN THEIR UNIT ONLY WITH EXPRESS WRITTEN CONSENT OF MANAGE- MENT. JUDGMENT IN FORCE FOR NEXT 9 MONTHS. IF COMPLIED WITH, SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WILL BE FILED. IF NOT, WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY BE OBTAINED BY EX-PARTE APPLICATION. NO STAYS, APPEALS OR CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION.
